---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or an enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Background

What's missing or limited today, and why it matters. Link related issues/ADRs if any exist.

## Scope

What this issue covers — be as concrete as you can (which classes/endpoints/components are affected, what the new behavior looks like).

## Out of scope

Anything adjacent that's deliberately *not* part of this issue (helps avoid scope creep and makes it easier to spin off follow-ups cleanly).

## Acceptance criteria

How we'll know this is done — ideally testable statements, not just "it works."

## Depends on

Any issues this is blocked by, if applicable.
